goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion decision 报告入口

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 promotion decision 报告入口
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision-report.ts 只读 CLI/函数和 focused tests。它读取 catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions，按 --date 汇总 promotable、blocked、status 分布、blocked reason 和 guardrail 通过/失败计数，并列出 promotable claim；缺少 decision 表时返回空 report 且不创建 Catty 表。src/catty/README.md 同步新增入口和边界说明。
summary.why: 前序切片已经有 canary promotion preview 和 promotion/block decision 审计写入，但落库后的 decision 缺少安全的只读观察面。这个报告入口让 Catty v0 的 memory dogfood/promotion 审计更接近真实可运行闭环，同时仍停在真实 user memory 写入之前。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 canary promotion decision 报告入口

decisions.chose: 只做 promotion decision 的只读报告入口，不写用户长期 memory、不写 catty_memory_audit、不更新 canary status、不接 heartbeat。
decisions.rationale: report 是 decision audit 之后的观察面，能提升 dogfood 可诊断性；真实转正或状态推进仍需要独立协议。

decisions.chose: 复用 listMemoryCanaryPromotionDecisions 读取既有 decision 表，而不是重新计算 promotion preview 或 canary eval。
decisions.rationale: 保持 eval、promotion preview、decision write、decision report 四层口径一致，避免产生第二套 guardrail 定义。

decisions.chose: 缺少 catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions 时返回空 report，且不创建任何 Catty 表。
decisions.rationale: 只读 smoke 和运行态检查不能污染 live SQLite。

decisions.chose: 把既有 Catty proposed overlaps 视为同一 catty 分支上的前序顺序切片。
decisions.rationale: 前序 intents 已完成 trail、judge、store、shadow CLI、candidate、canary queue/eval、promotion preview 和 decision write；本轮只在其后增加只读 report，不反向改变核心决策。

rejected.alternative: 把 report 接入 report.ts 或 nightly/heartbeat pipeline
rejected.reason: 本轮目标是最小只读入口；接调度会扩大运行态边界，并可能被误解为 promotion workflow 已经自动化。

rejected.alternative: report 时重新跑 canary eval/promotion preview
rejected.reason: 会让报告和已落库 decision 出现不同口径；报告应审计 persisted decision，而不是重新判案。

rejected.alternative: 在 report 中推进 canary status 或写 user memory
rejected.reason: 这会越过 v0 当前审计边界，把观察面变成转正执行面。

acknowledged_constraints.note: 新增 report 只读 persisted decisions，不写用户长期 memory。
没有接 launchd heartbeat，也没有新增模型调用路径。
既有 CLAUDE.md dirty 未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 记录该边界。

review_notes: TDD RED：bun test src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision-report.test.ts 先失败于缺少 ./memory-canary-promotion-decision-report 模块。
验证通过：focused report test 2 pass，16 expect。
验证通过：promotion decision 相关 tests 5 pass，39 expect。
验证通过：bun test src/catty/*.test.ts 36 pass，226 expect。
验证通过：bun test 41 pass，240 expect。
CLI smoke：--help 输出 usage；live --date 2026-05-27 返回空 report，未写 live DB。
验证通过：git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 无输出。
live runtime truth：bun src/ops.ts status --json --live 返回 ok=true，heartbeat installed/loaded，state=not running between cycles，last observe ok，last full pipeline ok/throttled。
提交 3fe44b9 只包含 src/catty/README.md、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision-report.ts、src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision-report.test.ts；worktree 仍有既有无关 CLAUDE.md dirty。

subsystems: Catty v0 memory canary promotion decision report
Catty v0 provisional memory dogfood observability
architectural_claims: Catty v0 now has a read-only report layer over durable promotion decisions, after decision write and before any real user memory write.
Promotion decision report observes persisted decision records instead of recomputing canary eval or promotion preview.
Missing decision state remains side-effect-free: report reads do not create Catty tables.
The slice preserves separation between canary dogfood evidence, promotion decision audit, and true user-prior memory promotion.
behavioral_changes: bun src/catty/memory-canary-promotion-decision-report.ts emits a date-scoped JSON report for the live Catty store by default.
--date YYYY-MM-DD filters persisted decisions by createdAt day; --store-db selects the SQLite store.
The report summarizes total, promotable, blocked, byStatus, blockedReasons, guardrail totals, and promotable claim/confidence/evidence counts.
Missing catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions returns an empty report without creating Catty tables.
security_implications: The command reads only catty_memory_canary_promotion_decisions through the existing list helper and does not read ~/.agents/memory/config.json, payload_json, API keys, cookies, or provider env vars.
The command performs no model calls and has no --pi path.
The command writes no user memory, no catty_memory_audit, no canary status, and no Catty schema during empty-state reads.
migration_notes: No schema migration is required; the report reads the additive decision table when present.
Existing promotion decision write/list behavior is unchanged.
